bank.retain_mission: Extract legal-billing-time-tracking decisions, client-intake workflows, and document-review outcomes.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about jurisdictions, matter types, billing/intake conventions, and recurring document-review patterns. Ignore one-off matter notes.

mental_models.name: Matter & Jurisdiction
mental_models.source_query: What matter types and jurisdictions does the practice handle? Include intake and billing conventions.

mental_models.name: Review Patterns
mental_models.source_query: What document-review patterns and red flags recur? Include precedent libraries and standard clauses.
